calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing For Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Jul-12-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Robert E. Aune , Esq. for the plaintiff 1011 23rd Street Owner's Association.
Witness for plaintiff: Mahara Espinoza, placed under oath and testifies.
Default of Defendants Anthony Oh and Chris Oh, joint and severally has been duly entered.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages/Principal - $32,499.97
Prejudgment Interest $
Attorneys' fees -
Costs - $526.00 for a Total of $33,025.97
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default of Defendants Anthony Oh and Chris Oh, joint and severally has been duly entered.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
